proved: The runner rejects a missing deadline and heartbeat intervals above 60 seconds.
A silent child produces a heartbeat and a hung child is terminated at its deadline with exit code 124.
Successful and failing child exit codes are preserved.
On Windows, npm is executed through npm-cli.js with the current Node binary rather than an ambient command shell.
The watchdog supervised its own npm test command and the full structural audit successfully.
Windows timeout cleanup targets the complete child process tree.
notProved: Unix TERM-to-KILL cleanup on a live Unix host.
Recovery of an operation after timeout; the runner only terminates and reports it.
Sanitization of arbitrary child output; output is forwarded and no secondary research-content log is created.
